name: Verify G+ Cognitive Ability
description: Verify G+ is a measure of general cognitive ability using three reasoning formats: verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning. It predicts job performance across a wide range of roles and levels. Suitable for graduate and professional selection.
search_text:
Name: Verify G+ Cognitive Ability
Test Type: Ability & Aptitude
Type Codes: A
Description: Verify G+ is a measure of general cognitive ability using three reasoning formats: verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning. It predicts job performance across a wide range of roles and levels. Suitable for graduate and professional selection.
Duration: 36 minutes
Remote Testing: Yes
Adaptive/IRT: Yes
Languages: English, French, German, Spanish
Job Levels: professional, manager, graduate

name: OPQ32r
description: The OPQ32r (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) measures personality preferences and their impact on work behavior. It covers 32 dimensions of personality relevant to workplace performance, covering thinking styles, relationships, and emotional maturity. Used for selection, development and coaching.
search_text:
Name: OPQ32r
Test Type: Personality & Behavior
Type Codes: P
Description: The OPQ32r (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) measures personality preferences and their impact on work behavior. It covers 32 dimensions of personality relevant to workplace performance. Used for selection, development and coaching.
Duration: 25 minutes
Remote Testing: Yes
Adaptive/IRT: No
Languages: English, French, German, Spanish, Dutch, Chinese, Japanese
Job Levels: professional, manager, director

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Java 8 programming concepts including lambda expressions, streams, functional interfaces, new Date/Time API, and object-oriented programming principles. Suitable for experienced Java developers.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information and draw logical conclusions. Adaptive verbal reasoning test suitable for graduate and professional roles requiring strong communication and comprehension skills.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to make decisions and draw conclusions based on numerical data such as statistics, graphs, and tables. Suitable for roles requiring data analysis, financial reasoning, and quantitative thinking.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Manager
description: Assesses judgment and decision-making in realistic managerial scenarios. Candidates rate the effectiveness of different responses to situations commonly encountered by managers. Measures people management, stakeholder handling, and operational decisions.
search_text:

Test Type: Biodata & Situational Judgement

Duration: 20 minutes
Remote Testing: Yes
Adaptive/IRT: No
Languages: English
Job Levels: manager

name: Sales Aptitude Assessment
description: Comprehensive assessment for sales roles measuring drive, resilience, customer focus, and commercial awareness. Combines personality traits with situational judgement scenarios relevant to sales environments. Predicts sales performance and customer relationship management.
